endpoints.name: Change the password
endpoints.description:
Set a new password for the account.

**Note**: requires full access to the *Account*.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY.

endpoints.name: List Places of the Account
endpoints.description:
List the *Places* of the account.

**Note:** requires full access to the *Account*.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY.

endpoints.name: Create a Place
endpoints.description:
Create a new *Place*.

A *Device* (`class`: `MINT`, `address`: `0`) is automatically created and attached to the new *Place*.

**Note:** requires full access to the *Account*.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY.

endpoints.name: List active Tokens of the Account
endpoints.description:
List the active *Tokens* on the account.

**Note:** requires full access to the *Account*.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY.

endpoints.name: Revoke a Token
endpoints.description:
Revoke the given *Token*.

**Note:** requires full access to the *Account*.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{TOKENID}} with a real tokenid.

endpoints.name: List Users of the Account
endpoints.description: Get the list of *Users* of this *Account*.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY.

endpoints.name: New User
endpoints.description:
Add a *User*.

**Note**: requires full access to the *Account*.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY.

endpoints.name: Information about a User
endpoints.description: Get information about a *User* in the same *Account*.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid.

endpoints.name: Delete a User
endpoints.description:
Delete a *User* from this *Account*, and revoke all his/her *Tokens*.

**Note**: requires full access to the *Account*.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid.

endpoints.name: Modify a User
endpoints.description:
Modify a *User*.

**Note**: requires full access to the *Account*.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid.

endpoints.name: List metadata
endpoints.description: Get the metadata.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid.

endpoints.name: Modify metadata
endpoints.description:
Modify the metadata.
Keys are limited to the same format as tags (up to 21 characters, [a-z0-9], starting with [a-z]). Values can be any JSON value.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid.

endpoints.name: Get a token using login+password
endpoints.description:
Get an access+refresh tokens pair from login and password information.

The *access token* obtained with this request can then be used in
an `Access-Token` HTTP header or in a `token` URL query parameter
in requests that require authentication.

The *refresh token* can be used with `/auth/refresh` when the *access
token* expires to retrieve a new *access token*. The lifetime of the
refresh token is the maximum lifetime of this authentication request.

The default lifetime of the *refresh token* is defined by the `appId`
used. The `ttl` input parameter allows to request a *refresh token*
with a shorter lifetime.

To implement *logout*, use `/auth/revoke`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY.

endpoints.name: Refresh a token
endpoints.description:
Get a new *access token* using a valid *refresh token*.

This is a **replacement** of the *access token*: if an existing *access
token* was still not expired, it is invalidated.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY.

endpoints.name: Ask for a new password
endpoints.description:
Trigger the request of a new password.

The account administrator will receive an e-mail with an URL pointing to a form
to allow him/her to enter a new password.
The old password is still functional until a new one is submitted.

Either the login or e-mail of the account must be given.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY.

endpoints.name: Revoke a token
endpoints.description:
Invalidate the authentication used for the request. The access token and the refresh token will be invalid after this request.
This request is typically called to implement logout.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY.

endpoints.name: Information about a Device
endpoints.description: Get information about a *Device*.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{DEVICEID}} with a real deviceid.

endpoints.name: Update a Device
endpoints.description: Modify information about a *Device*: its name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{DEVICEID}} with a real deviceid.

endpoints.name: Add dynamically a functionality
endpoints.description:
Add a *Functionality* to the device.

Required parameters are :
- functionality class
- endpoint

Each device class has its own restrictions on which Functionality classes can be added and on which endpoints.
Only a few devices allow to add Functionalities.

|Device class|Functionality class|Endpoints|
|------------|-------------------|---------|
|MINT        |CurrentPeriod      |1,2,3    |
|MINT        |ElectricityRates   |1,2,3    |
|MINT        |GenericRate        |1,2,3    |

**Note**: requires full access to the *Account*.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{DEVICEID}} with a real deviceid.

endpoints.name: List metadata
endpoints.description: Get the metadata.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{DEVICEID}} with a real deviceid.

endpoints.name: Modify metadata
endpoints.description:
Modify the metadata.
Keys are limited to the same format as tags (up to 21 characters, [a-z0-9], starting with [a-z]). Values can be any JSON value.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{DEVICEID}} with a real deviceid.

endpoints.name: Run actions
endpoints.description: Run an *Action* on zero, one or multiple Functionalities selected with tags.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{ACTION}} with a real action. Replace {{DEVICEID}} with a real deviceid.

endpoints.name: List tags
endpoints.description: Get the tags of a *Device*.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{DEVICEID}} with a real deviceid.

endpoints.name: Modify tags
endpoints.description: Modify the tags of a *Device*.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{DEVICEID}} with a real deviceid.

endpoints.name: Information about a Functionality
endpoints.description: Get the *Functionality*.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{FUNCTIONALITYID}} with a real functionalityid.

endpoints.name: Modify a Functionality
endpoints.description: Modify information about a *Functionality*: its name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{FUNCTIONALITYID}} with a real functionalityid.

endpoints.name: Get history of multiple attributes
endpoints.description:
Get the values of multiple *Attributes* and their history.

If the `names` parameter is not given, all the attributes of the *Functionality*
are returned. As the list may be huge, this must be avoided.

If the `to` parameter is set, `from` must also be set.

If `from` is not set, only the last value is returned.

The `surround` parameter allows to ask also for one value beyond each interval boundaries.

The request may fail if too many values are asked.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{FUNCTIONALITYID}} with a real functionalityid.

endpoints.name: Get an Attribute value
endpoints.description: Get the *Attribute* value and the last time when it changed.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{FUNCTIONALITYID}} with a real functionalityid. Replace {{ATTRIBUTENAME}} with a real attributename.

endpoints.name: List metadata
endpoints.description: Get the metadata.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{FUNCTIONALITYID}} with a real functionalityid.

endpoints.name: Modify metadata
endpoints.description:
Modify the metadata.
Keys are limited to the same format as tags (up to 21 characters, [a-z0-9], starting with [a-z]). Values can be any JSON value.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{FUNCTIONALITYID}} with a real functionalityid.

endpoints.name: Run an action
endpoints.description: Run an action on the Functionality.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{ACTION}} with a real action. Replace {{FUNCTIONALITYID}} with a real functionalityid.

endpoints.name: List tags
endpoints.description: Get the tags of a *Functionality*.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{FUNCTIONALITYID}} with a real functionalityid.

endpoints.name: Delete a Notification
endpoints.description: Delete a *Notification*.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{NOTIFICATIONID}} with a real notificationid.

endpoints.name: List accessible Places

Change information about a *Place*.

**Note**: requires full access to the *Account*.

endpoints.name: List Buses
endpoints.description:
Get the list of *Buses* available on the gateway of this *Place*.
If `withPairing` is `true`, return only buses that allow device pairing (see `/places/{placeId}/buses/{busId}/pairing`).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{PLACEID}} with a real placeid.

endpoints.description:
Get the state of the pairing window of the *Bus*.

**Note**: requires full access to the *Account*.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{PLACEID}} with a real placeid. Replace {{BUSID}} with a real busid.

endpoints.name: Open/Close the pairing window
endpoints.description:
Open/Close the pairing window.

**Note**: requires full access to the *Account*.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{PLACEID}} with a real placeid. Replace {{BUSID}} with a real busid.

endpoints.name: List of Devices
endpoints.description: Get the list of *Devices* available in this *Place*.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{PLACEID}} with a real placeid.

endpoints.name: Get autonomy rate of the place
endpoints.description:
Compute the autonomy rate of the *Place* on a time period.

`autonomy = 1 - (elec_drawn / elec_total_usage)`
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{PLACEID}} with a real placeid.

endpoints.name: Get electricity virtual flows
endpoints.description:
Get the mapping of virtual electricity flows to functionalities.

Some rules are applied to expand the virtual flows using the concrete
flows available.

The `factor` tells how each energy value coming from a functionality
must be added with values from other functionality to compute the
energy of the virtual flow. Factors are usually `1` or `-1`.

The `code` property gives the result which may be partial:
- If all flows are available, `200000` is returned.
- If no flows are available (indicating that the place has no
  electricity functionality or that no functionality has been attached
  to a flow), the `code` is `200001`. The `missing` property contains
  all the requested flows.
- If some flows are missing, the `code` is `200002` and the `missing`
  property lists them.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{PLACEID}} with a real placeid.

endpoints.name: Get electricity flows setup
endpoints.description:
Get the mapping of functionalities to electricity flows.

A functionality is attached to *at most* one flow.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{PLACEID}} with a real placeid.

endpoints.name: Get self-consumption rate of the place
endpoints.description:
Compute the self-consumption rate of the *Place* on a time period.

`selfConsumption = 1 - (elec_feed_in / elec_total_usage)`
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{PLACEID}} with a real placeid.

endpoints.name: List Functionalities
endpoints.description: Get the list of *Functionalities* available in this *Place*.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{PLACEID}} with a real placeid.

endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{PLACEID}} with a real placeid.

endpoints.name: Run actions
endpoints.description:
Run an *Action* on zero, one or multiple *Functionalities* selected with tags.

*Device* and *Functionality* selection are combined with « AND ».

If no functionality is matched by the device/functionality selection, an empty array is returned.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{ACTION}} with a real action. Replace {{PLACEID}} with a real placeid.

endpoints.description:
Delete a *Program*.

**Note**: requires full access to the *Account*.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{PROGRAMID}} with a real programid.

endpoints.name: Modify a Program
endpoints.description:
Modify a *Program*:
- name
- status (enabled/disabled)
- code

**Note**: requires full access to the *Account*.

endpoints.name: History of executions of a Program
endpoints.description: Get the execution history list of this *Program*.

endpoints.name: List metadata

endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{PROGRAMID}} with a real programid.

endpoints.name: Modify metadata of a Program
endpoints.description:
Modify the metadata of a *Program*.
Keys are limited to the same format as tags (up to 21 characters, [a-z0-9], starting with [a-z]). Values can be any JSON value.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{PROGRAMID}} with a real programid.

endpoints.name: Run the Program
endpoints.description:
Launch the *Program*.
The result will be available later in the run history.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{IJENKO_API_KEY}} with your IJENKO API KEY. Replace {{PROGRAMID}} with a real programid.
